commands.review_summary:
The PR keeps source Telegram message ids on downloaded media refs, includes album sibling ids in prompt-context hydration, and adds a regression test for caption-first albums.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +131. Total +164 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main collects all album media but only hydrates the first/current media item into prompt context, while cached sibling messages can still carry raw telegram:file refs. I did not run a live Telegram album reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor/live Telegram proof and normal maintainer review are needed before merge; there is no narrow ClawSweeper code repair indicated by this review.

target.title: fix(agent): surface non_deliverable_terminal_turn with a specific retry message
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Surfaces `non_deliverable_terminal_turn` with a specific retry message instead
of the generic "Agent couldn't generate a response" fallback. The marker was
already classified but never surfaced to users.

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/types.ts` | Add `terminalError` to `EmbeddedRunAttemptResult` type |
| `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/types.ts` | Add `terminalError` to `EmbeddedAgentRunMeta` type |
| `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts` | Propagate `terminalError` from attempt result |
| `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts` | Spread `terminalError` into 4 meta blocks |
| `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-lifecycle-terminal.ts` | Add `terminalError` to deferred metadata keys |
| `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-failure-copy.ts` | Add `resolveExternalRunFailureTextForTerminalError` resolver |
| `src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts` | Wire resolver into `buildExternalRunFailureReply` |

## Evidence

### Retry-first copy: the user sees specific guidance instead of the generic fallback

When the model stops between tool calls without producing a reply, the new copy shows:
> ⚠️ The model stopped between tool calls without producing a reply. Please try the same message again — this usually resolves on retry. If it persists, use /new or a lighter model.

instead of the old generic:
> ⚠️ Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again, or use /new to start a fresh session.

_AI-assisted._
target.author: lsr911
